positive: A vibrant, maximalist pattern illustration of tropical fruit slices (pineapples, mangoes, limes) arranged in a repeating, seamless tessellation. Flat graphic design style, bold outlines, highly saturated colors, perfect repeat pattern, suitable for textile printing.
